name: academic-writing-toolkit
description: Project-centred academic writing, argument and evidence governance, thesis drift control, manuscript reframing, revision escalation, review synthesis, release governance, citation auditing, reference verification, and export skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Project navigation, argument-evidence governance, controlled writing, revision escalation, audit, and release workflows.
interface.longDescription: Academic Writing Toolkit packages a project-centred academic writing assistant plus local Codex skills for locating the canonical project state, mapping gap-data-result-claim-contribution-innovation relations, reviewing evidence balance and contribution focus, reading PDFs, recording source notes, building evidence-controlled gap reviews, controlling AI-assisted edits with spine cards and drift audits, reframing scientific manuscripts after author approval, stopping repeated failed revisions before another patch, auditing consistency, preparing release packets, validating human-evaluation handoffs, checking British English, verifying references, tracking progress, and exporting thesis materials.
defaultPrompt: Use the academic writing assistant to map my research project and select the next controlled workflow / 使用学术写作助手梳理项目并选择下一项受控工作流。
Create an edit contract, drift audit, and reframe plan for this thesis section.
